---
name: Feature Request
about: Propose a focused improvement to SupaVector.
title: "[feature] "
labels: ["enhancement"]
assignees: []
---

## Summary

Describe the capability you want in one short paragraph.

## Problem / Use Case

Explain the workflow that is blocked or awkward today.

## Proposed Shape

Describe the smallest useful version of the feature.

## Alternatives Considered

List any workarounds or alternative approaches you considered.

## Scope Notes

Call out what should stay out of scope for the first version.

## Verification

Describe how maintainers or contributors should verify the feature if it is built.
